goal: Add a small, well-tested pure utility roundToCents(amount: number): number that rounds a monetary amount to 2 decimal places (half-up), in a new focused file under the ledger/money-utilities area of this codebase (follow the repo's existing structure + test conventions), with a unit test covering normal, rounding-boundary, and negative cases. Keep it tiny and self-contained — the point is a clean, minimal end-to-end increment, not a large feature.
acceptance_hint: A tiny pure utility + unit test, implemented end-to-end. The objective is to EXERCISE THE PR->QA HANDSHAKE: Dev Clone implements, opens a PR (dev-clone.pr.created), QA Guardian tests it in an isolated worktree and merges-or-returns it. Feature value is secondary; the handshake firing is the success criterion.
notes: G3 proof seed (2026-06-02). Minimal task to prove the dev-clone.pr.created -> QA Guardian uc_pr_review handshake end-to-end on the real xprize-ai-bookkeeper repo, via the 8-member re-composed SDLC — ai-bookkeeper team (Dev Clone + QA Guardian, standards_config pr_base=main + automerge on). NOT held-out — proof, not certification.
